name: Rulezet — detection-rule search (CVE / ATT&CK)
description: Searches Rulezet (rulezet.org), the open-source repository of ~197k community detection rules (YARA, Sigma, Suricata, Zeek, CRS, Nova, Wazuh, Elastic) covering 858+ ATT&CK techniques, and imports the matches into XORCISM's detection-content stores. Pass `cve` to find rules linked to a CVE (via the CIRCL Vulnerability-Lookup proxy GET /api/rulezet/search_rules_by_vulnerabilities/<cve>), `technique` for an ATT&CK technique (an attack-chain step), or `query` for free-text search. Sigma & other formats → XTHREAT.SIGMARULE, YARA → XTHREAT.YARARULE (idempotent), with the ATT&CK techniques kept as tags — feeding Threat-Informed Defense and Purple-Team detection coverage. Public API (no auth; optional RULEZET_TOKEN). Offline: pass `file` = a Rulezet JSON response, or run the bundled sample.

parameters.name: cve
parameters.help: Find detection rules linked to this CVE (e.g. CVE-2020-27130)

parameters.name: technique
parameters.help: Find detection rules for this MITRE ATT&CK technique (e.g. T1059)

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A Rulezet JSON response to parse offline
